variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 190408 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 190408 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 190408 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 11 040 Air Filter for Compressor Intake | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 190408
variants.description: For over 70 years, MANN-FILTER has been synonymous with premium filters in original equipment quality worldwide. Benefit from a comprehensive product range and optimum filtration performance to protect drivers, engines and machinery. In the familiar yellow-green packaging, MANN-FILTER offers innovative solutions to new filtration challenges and produces on a global scale in accordance with the latest international production and test standards in the automotive industry.
specifications: Style: Air Filter for Compressor Intake
